text: I feel a sense of curiosity and anticipation here. The contemporary, glass-walled space invites reflection, and the vivid displays labeled 'R+D' spark thoughts about human progress and innovation. The intersection of research and development with our lived environment tugs gently at my philosophical mind—how do we know if progress is always positive, or if technology inevitably draws us closer to or further from a truly good life? The questions feel alive in this room, and I am compelled to stand in the midst of their subtle tension.
